profiles.description: Uses the submission's end-to-end p95 latency objective, 1% practical tolerance, and declared preference order.
profiles.label: Canonical latency

profiles.description: Explores the candidate with the lowest measured peak resident memory after the canonical quality and resource gates.
profiles.label: Memory first

profiles.description: Explores the candidate with the lowest measured p95 time to first token after the canonical gates.
profiles.label: First token first

profiles.description: Explores the candidate with the highest measured prompt-processing throughput after the canonical gates.
profiles.label: Prompt ingest first

profiles.description: Explores the candidate with the highest measured token-generation throughput after the canonical gates.
profiles.label: Decode first
